The Mandara too is hexangular, 30 cubits in width, and has
ten storeys and domes. Kailasa is similar to this, but has eight floors
and is 28 cubits in width.
[The height of Mandara would be 60 cubits and of Kailasa
56 cubits.

542 Bfhat Sarhhitd
The temple of the Vimdnacchanda type is hexagonal 21 cubits
breadth, and has latticed windows and eight floors. The Nandana
is similar, but has six storeys and 16 cupolas and is 32 cubits in
width.
[Gf. sfrrwr—
STT^TR: II
sr^rR-; q^rft trr: II]
Hg^Rmr %t€\ i
The temple known as Samudga is circular in shape, and the
Padma is shaped like a lotus (with eight petals). Both these measure
8 cubits in width, and have only one storey and one dome.
